textByHash.02ef9352b0e8af252f00e9acd21e224eea60e8ea: I'll throw you a stick, which you need to fetch as quickly as possible, from the area beyond the pipes.
textByHash.246bbf23fabe3e7d4715847aa96ec3f742236fc4: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!
textByHash.2835f17b407b85b0cb4ba9e0f9fb8d29dd243a29: I will throw your stick as soon as you jump onto the first stone.
textByHash.7ed28bfbe1a2cff2afece4afb4de2a877c5f026a: Be wary of the deathslide - you must hang by your teeth, and if your strength is not up to the job you will fall into a pit of spikes. Also, I would advise not carrying too much extra weight.
textByHash.b474a08f365b62f628fbafb84781729a96e6d874: Why didn't you hand the stick over?!!?
textByHash.d59e27acd27ff363566d5e7a92d7774950a39d01: Bring the stick back to the werewolf waiting at the end of the death slide to get your agility bonus.
